query:
INSERT INTO certificacoes (empresa, chaveJ, nomeAgente, situacao, dataCertif, ventoCertif, nrCertificadoConsig, dataCertif2, ventoCertif3, nrCertificadoPldft, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  a.empresa,
  a.chaveJ,
  a.nomeAgente,
  a.situacao,
  NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
  NOW(), NOW()
FROM agentes a
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM certificacoes c WHERE UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) = UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ))
)
AND a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL
AND a.chaveJ != '';
